products.name: Classic Gold Engagement Ring
products.description: Crafted in pure 22K yellow gold, this classic engagement ring features an elegant braided band design and a polished finish. A timeless symbol of love.

products.name: Royal Diamond Solitaire Ring
products.description: An exquisite 18K white gold ring featuring a brilliant-cut center solitaire diamond, flanked by micro-paved diamonds along the band for maximum sparkle.

products.name: Antique Kundan Gold Necklace
products.description: A magnificent antique kundan necklace set in 22K gold, decorated with intricate floral carvings, gemstone embellishments, and dangling seed pearls.

products.name: Maharani Gold Jhumka Earrings
products.description: Traditional gold jhumkas featuring delicate filigree patterns, miniature gold beads, and a stunning bell-shaped dangle that sways with grace.

products.name: Floral Design Gold Bangles (Set of 4)
products.description: A set of four beautifully matched gold bangles with embossed floral motifs. Perfect for bridal styling or festive celebrations.

products.name: Traditional Gold Mangalsutra
products.description: A modern yet sacred design featuring double black bead chains connected to a stunning gold pendant with floral and geometric engravings.

products.name: Royal Imperial Bridal Wedding Set
products.description: An opulent bridal masterpiece featuring a heavy choker necklace, a long rani haar, matching jhumkas, maang tikka, and a nose ring, detailed with rubies and emeralds.

products.name: Luxury Pearl & Gold Choker
products.description: A high-fashion choker necklace blending rows of premium freshwater cultured pearls with a hand-designed 18K yellow gold floral center clasp.

products.name: Engraved Royal Gold Kada
products.description: A bold and heavy single kada bracelet featuring traditional hand-engraved motifs and a secure side clasp. Designed for both grandeur and comfort.

products.name: Temple Style Ruby Studs
products.description: Exquisite temple jewellery studs depicting the goddess Lakshmi, seated in a lotus, surrounded by rubies and high-purity gold filigree work.

products.name: Ornate Silver Bridal Payal
products.description: Exquisitely designed 92.5 sterling silver bridal payal (anklets) featuring traditional handmade flower charms, small silver tinkling bells, and an antique oxidised finish.

products.name: Sterling Silver Diamond Necklace
products.description: A luxury modern sterling silver necklace set with brilliant cubic zirconia accents. Elegant layout, perfect for celebrations and high-class styling.

products.name: Sterling Silver Solitaire Ring
products.description: A stunning 92.5 sterling silver ring featuring a high-brilliance round-cut solitaire gem. Elegant and durable for daily luxury wear.

products.name: Oxidized Peacock Jhumka Earrings
products.description: Beautiful traditional Indian jhumkas with intricate peacock engravings and hanging oxidized silver beads. Adds a rustic heritage glow to any outfit.

products.name: Designer Silver Kada Bracelet
products.description: A heavy and bold unisex sterling silver kada bracelet with hand-carved spiral motifs. Polished to a mirror shine.

products.name: Classic Sterling Silver Curb Chain
products.description: A sleek and durable silver curb link chain. Made in Italy with high-purity sterling silver and a secure lobster clasp.

products.name: Simple Dailywear Silver Anklets
products.description: Lightweight daily wear silver anklets (payal) with a simple chain layout and delicate bead charms. Comfortable for everyday use.

products.name: Vintage Silver Emerald Ring
products.description: An antique-styled sterling silver ring hosting a gorgeous oval-cut natural green emerald gemstone, surrounded by filigree patterns.

products.name: Traditional Peacock Hanging Earrings
products.description: Handcrafted silver hanging earrings depicting royal peacocks. Finished with a light antique polish to accentuate details.

products.name: Sterling Silver Charm Bracelet
products.description: An elegant link chain bracelet supporting multiple tiny polished silver charms (heart, star, clover). A personalized fashion statement.

products.name: Royal Oxidized Silver Choker
products.description: A magnificent wide collar choker necklace in oxidized silver. Detailed tribal design that pairs beautifully with traditional dresses.

products.name: Silver Ganesha Protection Pendant
products.description: A sacred and beautifully detailed Ganesha pendant carved in solid 92.5 silver. Brings prosperity and positive protection energy.
